notes: Single-session model; coefficients describe correlation, not causation.
Green-lap filter removes in/out, safety-car and traffic laps but is heuristic.
Held-out laps come from whole unseen driver stints (grouped split), so within-stint correlation cannot leak between train and test.
Driver identity is included, so the model partly memorizes per-driver pace; it is not a generalizable cross-race predictor.
Weather, track evolution, and fuel mass are only crudely proxied (lap number).
